# VirtualDesktopAccessor (bundled binary)

This folder documents the **third-party** component shipped next to the AutoHotkey scripts as `VirtualDesktopAccessor.dll` in the repository root.

- **Upstream:** [github.com/Ciantic/VirtualDesktopAccessor](https://github.com/Ciantic/VirtualDesktopAccessor) (default `rust` branch)
- **License:** MIT — verbatim copy: [`LICENSE.txt`](LICENSE.txt) (from upstream `LICENSE.txt`)
- **Binary in this repo:** `VirtualDesktopAccessor.dll` at the project root (same directory as `win11-vd-api.ahk`), included as an **offline backup** alongside the required license text.

For a **newer** build after Windows updates, use the upstream [Releases](https://github.com/Ciantic/VirtualDesktopAccessor/releases) or run `download-vda.ps1` in the project root.
